arts.ttl: Report: What Tottenham insiders are now saying about Dominic Solanke after goalless start at N17
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will hope to use their League Cup win over Coventry City as a springboard to kickstart their season. Spurs have won just one...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals why Tottenham chose to sign Dominic Solanke over Ivan Toney after splashing club record £65m on striker
arts.sum: Spurs held an interest in Toney during the summer, Postecoglou confirmed, but eventually decided to swoop for Solanke.

Ange was asked about the challenge Thomas Frank's side bring to N17, and how important it is to get a result to bring back the feel-good factor... We’ll have to be ready for Brentford tomorrow, but we are at home and we’ve just got to make sure we continue with our strong performances in the league but turn those performances into results."

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou confirms summer interest in Ivan Toney
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has revealed Tottenham Hotspur considered moving for Ivan Toney during the summer transfer window. However, Postecoglou has confirmed Richarlison is out of action for the forseeable future and is unsure when he will return from injury.

arts.ttl: 'No-one is surprised anymore': Chris Sutton predicts who'll win between Tottenham and Brentford tomorrow
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur return to Premier League action this weekend when they host Brentford in a 3pm Saturday kick-off at N17. Spurs have received a confidence...

arts.ttl: 'I swear that you're ex-Chelsea': Sam Matterface shocked at what Scott Minto has just said about Tottenham
arts.sum: Scott Minto has just said something about Tottenham that shocked his TalkSPORT colleague Sam Matterface.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank compares Yoane Wissa to Kevin Schade and where Brentford back-up is "better"
arts.sum: Brentford are ruing an injury to Yoane Wissa but manager Thomas Frank insists the forward's replacement Kevin Schade will bring different qualities to help fill the void

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all eight games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League continues this weekend and Tom Hill has highlighted our writers' best bets for all eight matches taking place on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Postecoglou drops shock admission regarding summer Ivan Toney chase
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has admitted Tottenham Hotspur did ‘look at’ Ivan Toney in the summer before settling on signing Dominic Solanke. The Lilywhites made finally replacing Harry Kane their top priority this summer after battling through the 2023/24 season without an outright No.9. Spurs were linked with several high-profile strikers, including England international Toney, who was […] The post Tottenham: Postecoglou drops shock admission regarding summer Ivan Toney chase appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: Bees rocked by injury to star forward
